     The Numbers Business Report

Planes: Fire and Rescue (2014)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $59,157,732Details
International Box Office $97,241,912
Worldwide Box Office $156,399,644
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $19,200,593
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $11,196,769
Total $30,397,362
Further financial details...

Synopsis

When world famous air racer Dusty Crophopper learns that his engine is damaged and he may never race again, he must shift gears and is launched into the world of wildfire air attack. Dusty joins forces with veteran fire and rescue helicopter Blade Ranger and his courageous air attack team, including spirited super sooper Lil’ Dipper, heavy-lift helicopter Windlifter, ex-military transport Cabbie and a lively bunch of brave all-terrain vehicles known as The Smokejumpers. Together, the fearless team battles a massive wildfire, and Dusty learns what it takes to become a true hero.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$17,509,407 (29.6% of total gross)
Legs:3.38 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:37.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$50,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,826 opening theaters/3,839 max. theaters, 4.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $86,600,542

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 18th, 2014 (Wide) by Walt Disney
International Releases: July 17th, 2014 (Wide) (Slovenia)
July 17th, 2014 (Wide) (Portugal)
July 17th, 2014 (Wide) (Brazil)
July 17th, 2014 (Wide) (Netherlands)
July 17th, 2014 (Wide) (Serbia and Montenegro)
Video Release: November 4th, 2014 by Buena Vista Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG
Running Time: 83 minutes
Franchise: Planes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animated Inanimate Objects
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Shot in 3-D
Plot point: Disaster, Rescue
Social setting: In a Plane
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Source:Spin-Off
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Digital Animation
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Walt Disney Pictures, DisneyToon Studios, Prana Studios
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

When world famous air racer Dusty Crophopper learns that his engine is damaged and he may never race again, he must shift gears and is launched into the world of wildfire air attack. Dusty joins forces with veteran fire and rescue helicopter Blade Ranger and his courageous air attack team, including spirited super sooper Lil’ Dipper, heavy-lift helicopter Windlifter, ex-military transport Cabbie and a lively bunch of brave all-terrain vehicles known as The Smokejumpers. Together, the fearless team battles a massive wildfire, and Dusty learns what it takes to become a true hero.
